name: v9_dialog_big
architecture: AttentionBrain (Pre-LN + AdamW + RoPE), bigger model on cleaned dailydialog
notes: v8 stayed at 256D/8L on the same cleaned corpus and produced real-English word-salad. v9 scales to 384D/12L/12H (~21.5M brain params) to test whether more capacity yields multi-word grammar. Head_dim=32, RoPE max_seq_len=128. Eval pending.
